result.finding: Cross-platform Java application. No OS-specific deployment configuration found. As a Spring Boot / JVM application with no native code or OS-specific dependencies, it can run on any OS supporting Java 17 (Linux, Windows, macOS). Standard deployment target for Spring Boot applications is Linux (server/cloud environments).
evidence: No Dockerfile with OS-specific base image found
No Kubernetes nodeSelector with kubernetes.io/os found
No mvnw/mvnw.cmd Maven wrapper scripts found
No platform-specific shell scripts (.sh, .bat, .ps1) found in project
No OS-specific README or documentation found
values: Typical deployment target: Linux (x64) for server/cloud
